name: avatar
description: User avatar with image, initials fallback, color variants, size presets, and optional badge overlay.

props.name: source
props.description: Image source for the avatar photo; falls back to initials or fallback if omitted or fails to load

props.name: initials
props.description: Text initials displayed when no image is available

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling the avatar diameter

props.name: color
props.description: Background color token used for the initials/fallback circle

props.name: fallback
props.description: Custom fallback content; string shows as text, ReactNode renders directly

props.name: badge
props.description: Optional badge content positioned at the bottom-right of the avatar

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
// Image avatar
<Avatar source={{ uri: user.avatarUrl }} initials="JD" size="lg" />

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// Initials-only with badge
<Avatar initials="AB" color="secondary" badge={<Badge variant="success" />} />

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Small avatar used in a chat header
<Avatar source={{ uri: contact.photo }} initials={contact.initials} size="sm" />

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Custom fallback node when no image or initials are available
<Avatar fallback={<PersonIcon />} size="md" color="tertiary" />
